taskDescription: Click on the words that are resident cells of connective tissue (not transient cells from blood)
textField: Connective tissue contains both resident and transient cells. The resident cells include *fibroblasts* which synthesise collagen, *macrophages* which phagocytose debris, *mast* cells which release histamine, and *adipocytes* which store fat. Transient cells that arrive from the bloodstream include neutrophils, lymphocytes, plasma cells, and eosinophils. The extracellular matrix is produced mainly by the *fibroblast* and consists of collagen fibres, elastic fibres, reticular fibres, and ground substance.
